sections.paragraph:
to burn, to flame (also Syr. Ch. id.). Psa 104:4. לֹהֲטִים the flaming, those who breathe out fire and flames, Psa 57:5.

Piel לִהֵט to kindle, to make burn (used of a flame), with an acc. Joe 1:19 2:3 Psa 83:15 106:18 Isa 42:25 to blow (used of the breath), Job 41:13.

Hence לַהַט.

II. לָהַט i.q. לוּט, לָאַט (compare p. 211, A ), pr. to hide; hence to use occult and magical arts; whence לְהָטִים which see.
